question_text: Let (𝑋, 𝑌) have a bivariate normal distribution with 𝐸(𝑋) = 𝐸(𝑌) = 0.

options.D: enote the conditional variance of 𝑋 given 𝑌= 1 by 𝑉𝑎𝑟(𝑋|𝑌= 1) and the
options.C: onditional variance of 𝑌 given 𝑋= 2 by 𝑉𝑎𝑟(𝑌|𝑋= 2). 𝐸(𝑌|𝑋=2) 𝐸(𝑋|𝑌=1) = 8 then 𝑉𝑎𝑟(𝑌|𝑋=2) 𝑉𝑎𝑟(𝑋|𝑌=1) equals __________ (in integer).
